patch.note: Reduced turret lob speed and range to lessen unfair pressure in the narrow upper corridor where players died; slightly lowered wasp projectile speed to make dodging easier in tight vertical spaces.

Reduced early-game pressure from grubs and wasps near spawn; lowered grub contact damage and patrol speed, reduced wasp fire rate and projectile speed to give player breathing room in the opening corridor.
Reduced Wasp bob amplitude and patrol range to limit vertical sightline exploitation; slightly lowered Iron Moth seeker turn rate to make homing missiles fairer in vertical shafts.
Slightly increased early-game enemy threat to reduce initial boredom: faster Grub patrol, quicker Turret lobs, and faster Wasp projectiles with tighter bobbing.

Increased Iron Moth seeker missile speed and turn rate to pressure players who stall; raised Mech Moth missile speed and turn rate for the same reason; slightly increased Sky Sentinel dash speed and feather dart speed to punish stationary play.

Reduced Iron Moth seeker missile speed and turn rate to make homing projectiles more dodgeable in narrow corridors; slightly lowered Mech Moth missile homing aggression to reduce unavoidable damage in vertical shafts.

Reduced missile patroller homing turn rate and seeker missile turn rate to make projectiles more dodgeable in narrow corridors; slightly lowered iron moth seeker speed to reduce unavoidable damage at ladder tops.
Increase Wasp projectile speed and reduce cooldown to make flying enemies more threatening in vertical shafts; slightly increase Iron Moth seeker turn rate for better homing in tall spaces.

Increased missile_patroller homing missile turn rate and speed to better contest vertical movement in fortress levels; slightly increased drone_carrier drone chase speed and range for vertical pressure.
